title: 1000 Yen Hero
titleNative: 1000円ヒーロ
synopsis: “I won't become a hero even if I am poor, because as long as Honoka continues to smile, it's all worth it.” Monsters are on the loose! But luckily for the people of Japan, heroes are there to protect them, with powers that run on a rate of yen per second. For Hiasa Sen, however, there are many more important things to worry about, like catching sales on groceries, and his many part-time jobs, all to take care of his little sister. When danger approaches, however, he has a secret power of his own, but it may be more trouble than it's worth. (Source: Comikey)

synopsis: Masatora Akutsu has just transferred into class in Japan from a long way away - all the way from Hell, to be exact. Akutsu is a demon who's come to Earth to find someone who can motivate the forces of Hell to fight back against the invading Heavenly army. He i

愚かな天使は悪魔と踊る

title: Mimi's Tales of Terror
titleNative: ミミの怪談
synonyms: Las historias de fantasmas de Mimi
synopsis: University student Mimi and her boyfriend Naoto encounter one chilling mystery after another. There’s the enigmatic neighbor woman dressed in black from head to toe—but if she’s so odd, why does it seems like there are many others like her? Then, whose eyes track Mimi’s movements from the cemetery next door? And why does a bizarre red circle drawn on a basement wall change with each passing day? Nine scary stories that really happened, drawn from the famed collection of urban legends Shin Mimibukuro (New Earmuffs), and adapted into manga by horror genius Junji Ito! Chapter 1: On the Utility Pole Chapter 2: The Woman Next Door Chapter 3: Rustling in the Grass Chapter 4: Grave Placement Chapter 5: Seashore Chapter 6: Just the Two of Us Chapter 7: Scarlet Circle Chapter 8: Sign in the Field Chapter 9: Monster Prop (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Hu Yu She Zhi Wu
titleNative: 狐与蛇之舞
synopsis: The aloof, top-tier stylist of the entertainment world versus the down-to-earth, third-rate celebrity with a hidden dark side. An unexpected red carpet “revenge” sees Chu Xia “reborn” into the limelight under a new identity. Yet, the game of cat and mouse between ‘prey’ and “predator” has only just begun... Who will emerge as the ultimate victor?

title: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleRomaji: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

title: Black Jack
titleNative: ブラック・ジャック
synopsis: Among adult readers in Japan Black Jack is Osamu Tezuka’s most popular achievement, and perhaps the most close to the creator’s heart, as Tezuka considered entering the medical field—majoring in medicine in college—before devoting his life to comics. Black Jac

title: Inexpressive Kashiwada and Expressive Oota
titleRomaji: Kao ni Denai Kashiwada-san to Kao ni Deru Oota-kun
titleNative: 顔に出ない柏田さんと顔に出る太田君
synonyms: Expressionless Face Girl and Emotional Face Boy
synopsis: Meet Kashiwada-san, a female middle-school student, who remains emotionless regardless of how she is meddled with. And Oota-kun, unable to control his facial expressions, is the complete opposite of Kashiwada-san--but he keeps messing with her, against his better judgment?! Though both of them are the exact opposite, will a mutual love eventually develop between them...? Note: Total chapter count includes 10 extra chapters.

title: Jipchang Malgo, Ihonhae Juseyo!
titleNative: 집착 말고, 이혼해 주세요!
synonyms: I Want a Divorce, Please Stop Obsessing Over Me!
Don’t Be Obsessed, Let’s Get a Divorce!
synopsis: Edelis Brill, the beloved only daughter of a countess, sees herself stabbed to death by the emperor's sword in a book she discovers in her study. Seeking to change her fate, Edelis rescues the book's sole main character, the slave gladiator Lehan, and pours her endless affection into him. But! Lehan, whom she believed would protect her from the emperor's blade, has returned as the emperor, intent on her heart?! Edelis tries to escape, but Lehan's obsession grows ever stronger... Stop obsessing, divorce me! (Source: KakaoPage, translated)

title: ROLL OVER AND DIE: I Will Fight for an Ordinary Life with My Love and Cursed Sword!
titleRomaji: "Omae Gotoki ga Maou ni Kateru to Omou na" to Yuusha Party wo Tsuihou Sareta node, Outo de Kimama ni Kurashitai
titleEnglish: ROLL OVER AND DIE: I Will Fight for an Ordinary Life with My Love and Cursed Sword!
titleNative: 「お前ごときが魔王に勝てると思うな」と勇者パーティを追放されたので、王都で気ままに暮らしたい
synonyms: Do You Think Someone like You Could Defeat the Demon Lord?
「就凭你也想打败魔王吗」被勇者一行所驱逐的少女要如何才能在王都过上自由的生活
Bị đuổi khỏi nhóm Anh hùng, tôi muốn sống tự do tự tại ở Vương đô
synopsis: Flum Apricot was never meant to be a hero. Despite zero stats across the board and a power she can’t even use, she somehow finds herself included in a party of heroes. But Flum’s life hits rock bottom when the party’s renowned sage, Jean Inteige, decides that the useless girl is dead weight, and arranges to have her sold into slavery. Tossed to monsters to be feasted upon for her master’s entertainment, Flum makes the desperate choice to reach for a cursed weapon…and something new awakens within her. A grimdark tale about one woman’s blood-soaked quest to reclaim her life! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Lodoss Tousenki: Eiyuu Kishiden
titleNative: ロードス島戦記-英雄騎士伝-
synonyms: Record of Lodoss War: Chronicles of the Heroic Knight
synopsis: Five years ago, a band of six adventurers defeated the conquering armies of Marmo, the dark island, and saved the accursed island, Lodoss. Since that day, the survivors have been honored as heroes, and their deeds have become legends. But the evil never perished...it retreated, waited and schemed. Now, the Black Knight of Marmo has returned to threaten the accursed island once more. Old heroes must heed the call to defend their homeland and new heroes are forged as the battle for Lodoss begins anew... (Source: AnimeNewsNetwork)

title: Ame to Umi
titleNative: あめとうみ
synopsis: It’s been a week since Ame Otosaka started high school. While glancing down the hallway, he catches sight of a familiar face: Umi Karasaki, a classmate from his middle school who had been absent without notice since the very first day of term. Even when she finally makes it to school, Umi remains a mystery: always looking down, hiding behind a mask of polite, empty smiles. Concerned, Ame decides to reach out and speak to her... (Source: Shueisha, translated)

title: Dame Inu Kanojo
titleNative: ダメ犬彼女
synopsis: Sakurako Kuramochi has totally remade herself into a more popular girl since her debut in high school. However, deep down inside, she still bears the scars of being dumped by a girl she used to like. One day after school, while walking downtown, Sakurako bumps into another girl, who turns out to be that girl who rejected her in the past! For some reason, she proclaims that she's fallen in love with Sakurako at first sight, and asks if they can meet again. Sakurako gets angry at the girl for not recognizing her, and comes up with a plan to get revenge...? (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Chronicles of an Online Game Addict's Reincarnation in Another World: He Can't Use the Fighting Skill That Earned Him the Title of Fist King, so He Started Swinging a Club for Eight Hours a Day
titleRomaji: Netoge Haijin no Isekai Tenseiki: Ken Ou to Yobareta Saikyou no Kobunshi ga Tsukenai node, 1-nichi 8-jikan Konbou wo Furu Koto kara Hajimeta
titleEnglish: Chronicles of an Online Game Addict's Reincarnation in Another World: He Can't Use the Fighting Skill That Earned Him the Title of Fist King, so He Started Swinging a Club for Eight Hours a Day
titleNative: ネトゲ廃人の異世界転生記 拳王とよばれた最強の拳が使えないので、1日8時間こん棒を振ることからはじめた
synopsis: Kazuya finally became the strongest player in the VRMMORPG he devoted his life to and gained the title "Fist King." Just as he became number one, he was reborn in another world like the game, where monsters roam free! In this new world where firearms are favored over melee weapons, Kazuya takes up a club to once again pursue his ideal strength! (Source: MangaPlaza)
chapterSourceTitle: Senchi Kara Kaette kita Takashi-kun. Futsuu ni Koukou Seikatsu wo Okuritai

title: Sword Art Online Unital Ring
titleNative: ソードアート・オンライン ユナイタル・リング
synopsis: Orchestrated by genius scientist Akihiko Kayaba, the SAO Incident created a game you couldn't leave until you beat it. One where death in the game meant death in the real world... Kirito is a survivor of SAO who now spends his time playing the new VRMMORPG Alfheim Online with his old SAO friends, Asuna and Alice. But Kirito soon finds himself caught up in a mysterious game he never expected... (Source: Yen Press)

tags.name: Isekai
tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

tags.name: Death Game
tags.description: Features characters participating in a game, where failure results in death.

tags.name: Swordplay
tags.description: Prominently features the use of swords in combat.

title: Moriagaranai Date
titleNative: 盛りあがらないデート
synopsis: A So-So Match on a Dating App… Haida, cursed with chronic bad luck, signs up for a dating app as part of her “what-the-heck” phase. She matches with Kuroi, a man who joined for equally reckless reasons. But their conversation never quite clicks, and an unmistakably low-key, awkward mood sets in. Everything they do backfires, resulting in a date that is astonishingly unexciting. Thinking there’s no way there will be a second date in an atmosphere like this… wait, what? Why are they making plans to meet again!? A first date with someone you met on a dating app that just doesn’t take off? The deadpan, surreal banter is way too addictive! A slow-burn, gently unfolding romance that begins with a dating app.

title: Dalao Ni Tou You Diao Le
titleRomaji: Dalao Ni Tou You Diao Le
titleNative: 大佬你头又掉了
synopsis: As we all know, you can level up by killing monsters, and I am... that monster. As the only zombie on earth that can turn around and not die, I concealed my identity and kept a low profile as a zombie in order to protect myself. However, I was worried about my sick ex-girlfriend, so I secretly protected her. I didn't expect that my ex-girlfriend had become a female warrior who killed zombies without blinking an eye, and I was discovered by her? I wanted to escape, she wanted to chase me, we struggled and fell in love, and in the end you told me that the whole world had to die? Okay, I won't pretend anymore, I am actually a vaccine. (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
titleEnglish: An Adventurer's Daily Grind at Age 29
titleNative: 29歳独身中堅冒険者の日常
synonyms: Everyday of the 29 years old single person adventurer.
synopsis: One day, while dungeon-diving for work, Hajime the adventurer encounters a starving girl named Rirui. The poor girl has been abandoned by her parents and has no relatives she can rely on. Unable to turn a blind eye, Hajime declares, "If you're gonna join my party, then stop crying!" So begins their life together...but as it turns out, Rirui is no ordinary little girl! (Source: K MANGA)

When he wakes up, he finds himself in Japan, where he spent time before being summoned. However, in the city, demons appearing from "gates" rampage, and those called hunters fight using magic. Returning from another world, Takeru decides to hide his powers and live, but...
